prose:
Benzaldehyde Fukui reactivity indices computed via DFT (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, tier 'standard', PySCF) in gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Single-point calculation on user-supplied geometry (not DFT-relaxed). Fukui function indices f⁺, f⁻, f⁰, and dual descriptor Δf computed from Mulliken partial charges of neutral (singlet), cation (doublet, +1), and anion (doublet, −1) states. Most electrophilic site: atom 3 (C, ortho to CHO), f⁺ = 0.3994. Most nucleophilic site: atom 1 (O, carbonyl), f⁻ = 0.2384. SCF converged; Fukui charge conservation checks passed (sum(f⁺) = 1.0000, sum(f⁻) = 1.0000). Integrity status ok, trustworthy.</prose>
